_comment: Copy this file to <workspace>/notifier.json (NOT into the repo). Add real recipient addresses per channel. Do NOT commit notifier.json — it's in .gitignore.

_channel_meanings.critical_oncall: Primary on-call. Gets immediate emails on confirmed Critical/High findings. No batching.
_channel_meanings.critical_team: CC list for the same immediate alerts.
_channel_meanings.cadence_monthly: Monthly executive rollup recipients (1st of month 09:00 UTC default).
